description: Emit a Recibo por Honorarios Electronico (RHE) via SUNAT SOL

empresa.description: Company or person name receiving the service

tipoDoc.description: Client document type. Use SIN DOCUMENTO for foreign companies.

descripcion.description: Service description (e.g. 'Servicios de desarrollo de software')

monto.description: Total amount. If moneda=USD, will be converted to PEN at SUNAT exchange rate.

moneda.description: Currency. PEN for soles, USD for dollars (auto-converts).

fechaEmision.description: Emission date. SUNAT allows max 2-3 days retroactive.

flags.--dry-run: Preview the RHE without submitting to SUNAT
flags.--batch <file>: Process multiple RHEs from CSV file

auth: Requires SOL session. Run 'sunat login' first.
